claims.value: hold at 800 MW with Nevada corridor fallback at 620 MW if transmission constrained by Feb 1

evidence.excerpt: we hold at 800 MW but add a Nevada corridor option as fallback. If transmission is constrained by Feb 1, we automatically drop to 620 MW.
